market_context:
Cohort size: 357 listings scraped in the same market.
Median nightly rate: £175.00
Median 90-day occupancy: 28.3%

title_variants: Free Parking & Quiet Suite with Patio
analysis.rewritten_desc:
Welcome to your peaceful home‑away‑from‑home in the heart of the city. This entire‑home suite comfortably sleeps up to four guests, offering a tranquil bedroom, a fully equipped living space, and a private patio where you can unwind with a morning coffee or an evening glass of wine. Free on‑site parking means you’ll never waste time hunting for a spot.  

Rated 4.99 by 91 delighted guests, our suite consistently delivers a five‑star experience—clean, quiet, and thoughtfully arranged for families or small groups. At £178 per night, you enjoy premium comforts without the hotel price tag.  

The open‑plan living area includes high‑speed Wi‑Fi, a smart TV for streaming your favourite shows, and a well‑stocked kitchen ready for home‑cooked meals. Step outside to the private patio, perfect for al fresco dining or simply soaking up the sunshine.  

With 76 nights still open over the next 90 days, there’s ample opportunity to book your stay now and secure a memorable getaway. Whether you’re visiting for work or leisure, this suite offers the space, privacy, and convenience you need. Book today and experience the blend of comfort and convenience that has earned us nearly perfect reviews.
top_amenity_gaps: Outdoor amenities – add garden furniture or BBQ to enhance patio appeal
Dedicated parking details – list free on‑site parking in amenities
Entertainment options – include TV, streaming services, or board games
analysis.photo_order_rec: Use a high‑quality image of the private patio as the cover photo, as outdoor space and free parking are the listing’s strongest differentiators.
key_diagnosis: Occupancy is only 15.2% booked (76 open nights) versus the market median of 28.3% – adjust pricing or add promotions to capture the £13,528 of potential revenue.
No amenities are listed despite offering outdoor space and free parking – add high‑value amenities (outdoor, parking, entertainment) to improve search ranking.
Photo count is unknown and likely incomplete – upload a full set of photos covering bedroom, living area, kitchen, patio, and parking, with the patio as the lead image.
analysis.outreach_hook: You have 76 open nights this quarter, representing over £13,500 of untapped revenue.
